description_long: This is a single-story brick bungalow surrounded by a low green hedge fence, featuring a flat roof and a modern, open floor plan. The front facade includes a small set of steps leading to the main entrance, with a patio area and outdoor seating. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the exterior, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The backyard contains a circular pool and is landscaped with a few trees and shrubs, providing a private outdoor retreat. A garage is attached to one side of the house, accessible from the driveway. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story brick bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, attached garage, and landscaped yard with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio seating, steps, and attached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and part of the backyard with the pool visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, large windows, and more of the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the pool, and landscaping details.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large windows on multiple facades
